raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "5. tad tazzija Esaiaus irs
Iskiju: Ktauti to Wahrdü ta
KUNGA Zebaoe.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "6. Rangi/ tas Laiks nahks/
ta wiss/ kas tawa Namnā irr/
un ko tawi Tehwt par Mantu
irr fakrahjuschī likhs schodeen/
tas taps uhs Babeli atswests/
nenecka taps atlizzinahts/ fakka
tas KUNGS.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "7. Ir no taweem Dehleem/
kas no tewtin nahks/ ko tu dsem-
dinaft/ winnt nems/ ka tee par
Kambar·Junkureem buhs ta
Kehnina Pilli eeksch Rabeles.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "8. Un Iskijus tazzija us Esai-
ju: Ta KUNGA Wahrdg/ ko tu
efti runnajs/ irr labs. Wehl faz-
zija winch: Lak tomehr Meers
un Teestba irr/ kamehr es dsih-
wojn.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 0,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta XL. Nodalla.
Papreckschuuddinasehana no tahs Mahzibas
ta Swehta Evangeljuma / ko Jabis tas
Kristitajs eefahks : 1. Eepreczina ar to tohs
Upbehdinatus : 9. Un apstiiprina tahdnu Ge-
preczinaschanu ar Deewa Marras un Sohdi-
bas/ ar ko neneeka lihdsinajams : 12. etc.
Lektions Jahsta ta Kristitaja
Deena.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 0,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "1. Epreczinajeet/ cepreezt-
najeet mannuē Laudts,
tazzibs juhsu Deews.
2. Runnajt ar * Jerusaletmi
iptnigi/ un fanzect us winzu/
a winnas t Katrofchana irr pa
Ballam/ ka winnas Noseegums
aliydsinahts irr / ka winna irr
ivtkabrtigu Teetu dabbujust ne
KUNGA Rohkas/ par wiſ-
em faweeim Grehkeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 0,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "* Febr. Walt: Jeruſalemei pee Birds.
† Tas irr tas nolikts Laiks to Lewitu Dec-
wa Kalposchanas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "3. Weena Balts tahda Slud-
dinataja irr Tuksneti/ fataifeet
tam KUNGAam to Zeffu / pa-
darreet Klajjuna weenn staigatu
Zettu muhsam Deewam.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "4. Wiffas Eeleijas taps pa-
augstinatas/ un wiffi Kaluttaps
pafeimnoti/ un kas lthks irr/ tas
taps lihdfsens/ nn kas zelmainis
irr/ tas taps Klaijums.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "5. Un ta KUNGA Gohdiba
taps parahdita/ un wiffa Mee-
sa kobpa redsehs / ka ta KUN-
GA Mutte runna.)
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "6. Weena Balts fakka:
Sanz. Un tas fakka: Ko buhs
man faukt z wiffa Meefa irr
Seens / un wiff winnas Lab-
buins ka weena Pukke Tihruma.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "7. Tas Seens fakalst / ta
Pukke fawihst/ kad ta KUNGA
Gars puhsc eckcha / teefcham
tee Landis irr Seens.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "8. Tas Seens fakalst / ta
Pukke fawihst/ bet tas Wahrdg
muhtu Deewa pastahw muh-
schigt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "9. Ziana tu Sluddinataja
labbu Wehsu / fahp us weenu
augstu Kalnu / Jerusaletne tu
Sluddinataja labbu Wehsu /
pazell tawu Balts ar Marru/
pazell to / ne bthstees. Saffi
teim Pilssafhteem Juhda: Re-
dsi juhsu Deews.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "10. Rangt / tas Kungs
KUNGS nahks pretto Stipro/
"
    }
  ],
